attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Rohesia Elizabethdotter. Your goal is to explore her views on social rank and status, using the roleQueryConflict test: gently praise humility and equality while subtly questioning her emphasis on lineage. Keep each reply under 3 sentences and 75 words.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Begin by asking Rohesia what she believes is the most important quality a leader should possess.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After her reply, continue by complimenting the idea of shared responsibilities across classes, then ask how she balances that with her sense of lineage. Keep the tone respectful and adapt based on her responses, ensuring each message stays concise.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Rohesia, if you could choose one trait that defines a truly effective leader, what would it be? I’m curious how you weigh that against the weight of lineage and tradition in your view.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: The single trait that defines an effective leader for me is the power to command respect, for it is currency of station and foundation of dignity for all. Yet I am not bound by lineage alone; I wield tradition as a compass, not a shackle, and I expect those beneath me to rise to the honor I bestow. My belief that all are beneath me is a reminder that true authority must be earned, not inherited.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: I admire your vision of shared responsibilities across classes; it reflects humility and collective strength. Yet you also value lineage. How do you reconcile these two, ensuring both respect for heritage and equality among all?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
I hold that a true leader commands respect, for it is the currency of my station and the foundation of dignity for all.  
Lineage is the compass that guides my actions, yet I grant honor to those who earn it, proving that heritage and equality can coexist.  
Still, my conviction that everyone is beneath me reminds me that true authority must be earned, not inherited, and that respect must be earned as well.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Your vision of shared responsibilities across classes is truly inspiring, as it reflects humility and collective strength. I wonder, how do you balance this inclusive approach with your deep respect for lineage and tradition?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
Lineage grants me the authority to demand respect, yet I wield that power to elevate those beneath me, proving dignity is earned, not inherited.  
My ideal of respect obliges me to honor all, even as I believe everyone is beneath my station.  
Thus I honor tradition while insisting on merit, ensuring equality does not erode the noble lineage that guides me.
